productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Ranger Navy Blue Sports Shoes
description: Heavily meshed upper for enhanced breathablity and lightweight comfort Synthetic leather overlays with adidas patented 3-Stripes on the sides for enhanced shoe structure Meshed and padded tongue and collar for breathable comfort Central lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Padded sockliner for all-day comfort and shock absorption Foam midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection TPR outsole with adiWear in the heel for enhanced durability in high wear areas AdiPrene for superior cushioning at impact Waffle pattern lugs for absolute grip and traction Flex grooves in the forefoot for ease of movement Impact guidance system for better shock distribution and energy return Scooped heel for enhanced cushioned comfort to the backfoot and ankles
